retry_reason: Not a wrapper — the refcount operation (kfree_skb) is a side effect of discarding the skb when rate limited; retrying would not change the rate limit status.

judge.reason: Primary purpose is to either queue the audit skb for transmission or discard it due to rate limiting; the kfree_skb (put) is only an incidental step on the discard path. The function is focused on audit log completion, not refcount management.
judge.retry_reason: Not a wrapper — the refcount operation (kfree_skb) is a side effect of discarding the skb when rate limited; retrying would not change the rate limit status.
